_comment: AM-OWNED landmine list. Ships MOSTLY EMPTY on purpose — the AM pre-loads what only they know. The system NEVER auto-detects at-risk/MSP status from data; it only honors this list (hard suppression) and, separately, surfaces *candidate* conflicts from free-text notes for the AM to confirm.

flags.note: Renewal at risk; exec escalation open since May. Do not surface expansion until resolved.
